query: INSERT INTO asset_index (user_id, asset_id, filename, updated_at, taken_at, lat, lng, media_type, person_ids, face_count, indexed_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(user_id, asset_id) DO UPDATE SET filename = excluded.filename, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, taken_at = excluded.taken_at, lat = excluded.lat, lng = excluded.lng, media_type = excluded.media_type, person_ids = excluded.person_ids, face_count = excluded.face_count, indexed_at = excluded.indexed_at
